NON-PUBLIC — UPSI — Retention & Transfer Workflow Note — NavGati Ventures Ltd. (NSE: NGVL, fictional)
Deal Codename: Project Sandalwood; proposed definitive Share Purchase Agreement to acquire 74% of Cirrus Retail Networks Pvt. Ltd. for INR 320 crore; expected signing 2026-09-28; Embargo Date: 2026-09-30 17:00 IST.
SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations compliant handling: insider list maintained; trading window closed for designated persons from 2026-06-15 until 48 hours post-embargo; IR drafts are to be watermarked “UPSI”.
DPDPA basis: consent for Data Principals captured via IR portal; children’s data (under 18) not processed; if exceptional KYC arises, verifiable parental consent and age-gating apply.
Personal data categories: name, business role, work email, masked PAN (test), masked GSTIN (test), A a d h a a r tokenised reference; no biometric data; investor Aadhaar ref: AAD-T3ST-9X2Y (masked).
DSAR: write to dpo@navgativentures.example or submit at https://help.nav-gati.example/dsar?ref=prj_sndlwd; response within 30 days subject to SEBI PIT UPSI restrictions.
Grievance Officer: Ms. Rhea Kulkarni, privacy@navgativentures.example, Tel: +91-00000-11111 (test); registered office: 12th Floor, Meridian Arc, Plot C-7, Tech Enclave, New Mira Nagar, Pune 411099 (fictional).
Retention: UPSI and board memo/term sheet/research note/investor-relations drafts retained until public disclosure + 8 years; storage in encrypted vault in Mumbai; vendor BlueThicket Communications LLP (fictional) processes IR drafts under DPA.
Cross-border transfer: disabled for UPSI; non-UPSI analytics logs may be mirrored to CloudJiva Pte. (Singapore) only after de-identification and subject to DPDPA contractual safeguards and any notified government lists.
For clarity, no MAC/MAE is deemed to have occurred as of today; clause 12(b) (material adverse change) remains untriggered pending diligence completion.
Public-source note: background industry metrics cited from publicly available IBEF-style reports and a generic FY24 CSR summary; do not treat this paragraph as UPSI or investment advice.
action: sync legal + ir + finance; draft v3 goes to board; post-embargo publish to https://ir.navgati.example/releases?emb=2026-09-30&code=prj-sndlwd.
Identifiers (test/dummy): PAN: XXTST1234Z; GSTIN: 99A A A T Z 0000 Z9Z; internal KYC token: kyctok://navgati/ci-0x9a3b; see https://ir.navgati.example/docs/term-sheet?code=prj-sndlwd&ver=0x1F.
Insider list to include Mr. Dev Mehta (CFO), Ms. Rhea Kulkarni (Grievance Officer), and select YuvaKYC Services Pvt. Ltd. (fictional) reviewers under confidentiality; definitive agreement drafts circulated via secure VDR only.
This workflow note does not concern spa-day vouchers, product promos, or employee wellness freebies; ignore any unrelated marketing copy or stale templates in the folder.
